sentences.target: Ich kaufe heute Margarine im Supermarkt.

translations.de: Ich kaufe heute Margarine im Supermarkt.
translations.en: I'm buying margarine at the supermarket today.
translations.es: Hoy voy a comprar margarina en el supermercado.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, j'achète de la margarine au supermarché.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天要在超市买人造黄油。
translations.yue: 我今日喺超市買人造牛油。
translations.pt: Hoje vou comprar margarina no supermercado.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi mua bơ thực vật ở siêu thị.
translations.nl: Vandaag koop ik margarine in de supermarkt.
translations.hi: आज मैं सुपरमार्केट से मार्जरीन खरीद रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Σήμερα αγοράζω μαργαρίνη από το σούπερ μάρκετ.
translations.nb: I dag kjøper jeg margarin på supermarkedet.
translations.id: Hari ini aku membeli margarin di supermarket.
translations.sv: I dag köper jag margarin i mataffären.
translations.ro: Astăzi cumpăr margarină de la supermarket.
translations.da: I dag køber jeg margarine i supermarkedet.
translations.ja: 今日はスーパーでマーガリンを買う。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; main predicate.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb, indicating time.
Common noun, feminine; direct object in accusative.
Preposition contracted with the definite article ('in dem'); heads a prepositional phrase with dative.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'im' (dative).

sentences.target: Ich hole die Margarine aus dem Kühlschrank.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhoːlə diː maʁɡaˈʁiːnə aʊ̯s deːm ˈkyːlʃʁaŋk/

translations.de: Ich hole die Margarine aus dem Kühlschrank.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhoːlə diː maʁɡaˈʁiːnə aʊ̯s deːm ˈkyːlʃʁaŋk/
translations.en: I'm getting the margarine from the fridge.
translations.es: Saco la margarina de la nevera.
translations.fr: Je sors la margarine du frigo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我从冰箱里拿出人造黄油。
translations.yue: 我喺雪櫃攞出人造牛油。
translations.pt: Vou pegar a margarina na geladeira.
translations.vi: Tôi lấy bơ thực vật từ trong tủ lạnh.
translations.nl: Ik pak de margarine uit de koelkast.
translations.hi: मैं फ्रिज से मार्जरीन निकाल रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Βγάζω τη μαργαρίνη από το ψυγείο.
translations.sv: Jag tar ut margarinet ur kylen.
translations.da: Jeg tager margarinen ud af køleskabet.
translations.ja: 冷蔵庫からマーガリンを取り出す。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; main predicate.
Definite article, feminine accusative; determiner of 'Margarine'.
Common noun; direct object of 'hole' (accusative).
Preposition selecting dative; introduces a source/location.
Definite article, dative singular; determiner of 'Kühlschrank'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'aus' (dative).

sentences.target: Er streicht Margarine aufs frische Brot.

translations.de: Er streicht Margarine aufs frische Brot.
translations.en: He's spreading margarine on fresh bread.
translations.es: Está untando margarina en pan fresco.
translations.fr: Il étale de la margarine sur du pain frais.
translations.it: Sta spalmando margarina su pane fresco.
translations.ko: 그는 신선한 빵에 마가린을 바르고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在新鲜的面包上抹人造黄油。
translations.yue: 佢喺新鮮麵包上面搽人造牛油。
translations.pt: Ele está passando margarina no pão fresco.
translations.he: הוא מורח מרגרינה על לחם טרי.
translations.vi: Anh ấy phết bơ thực vật lên bánh mì mới.
translations.ar: هو يدهن المارجرين على خبز طازج.
translations.nl: Hij smeert margarine op vers brood.
translations.hi: वह ताज़ी रोटी पर मार्जरीन लगा रहा है।
translations.nb: Han smører margarin på ferskt brød.
translations.id: Dia mengoleskan margarin pada roti segar.
translations.sv: Han brer margarin på färskt bröd.
translations.ro: El întinde margarină pe pâine proaspătă.
translations.da: Han smører margarine på frisk brød.
translations.ja: 彼は焼きたてのパンにマーガリンを塗っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate.
Common noun; direct object of 'streicht' (accusative).
Contraction of 'auf das'; preposition indicating direction onto a surface; governs accusative.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Brot'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'aufs'.

sentences.target: Ohne Margarine wird der Kuchen zu trocken.
sentences.reading: /ˈoːnə maʁɡaˈʁiːnə vɪʁt deːɐ̯ ˈkuːxən tsuː ˈtʁɔkən/

translations.de: Ohne Margarine wird der Kuchen zu trocken.
translations.ipa: /ˈoːnə maʁɡaˈʁiːnə vɪʁt deːɐ̯ ˈkuːxən tsuː ˈtʁɔkən/
translations.en: Without margarine, the cake gets too dry.
translations.es: Sin margarina, el pastel queda demasiado seco.
translations.fr: Sans margarine, le gâteau devient trop sec.
translations.it: Senza margarina, la torta diventa troppo secca.
translations.zh-Hans: 没有人造黄油，蛋糕会太干。
translations.yue: 冇咗人造牛油，個蛋糕會太乾。
translations.ru: Без маргарина торт получается слишком сухим.
translations.pt: Sem margarina, o bolo fica seco demais.
translations.he: בלי מרגרינה, העוגה יוצאת יבשה מדי.
translations.tr: Margarin olmadan kek çok kuru oluyor.
translations.vi: Không có bơ thực vật thì bánh sẽ quá khô.
translations.ar: بدون مارجرين تصبح الكعكة جافة جدًا.
translations.nl: Zonder margarine wordt de cake te droog.
translations.uk: Без маргарину торт виходить надто сухим.
translations.hu: Margarin nélkül a torta túl száraz lesz.
translations.hi: मार्जरीन के बिना केक बहुत सूखा हो जाता है।
translations.pl: Bez margaryny ciasto robi się zbyt suche.
translations.el: Χωρίς μαργαρίνη, το κέικ γίνεται πολύ ξηρό.
translations.nb: Uten margarin blir kaken altfor tørr.
translations.id: Tanpa margarin, kue jadi terlalu kering.
translations.sv: Utan margarin blir kakan för torr.
translations.ro: Fără margarină, prăjitura iese prea uscată.
translations.cs: Bez margarínu je dort příliš suchý.
translations.da: Uden margarine bliver kagen alt for tør.
translations.fi: Ilman margariinia kakusta tulee liian kuiva.
translations.ja: マーガリンがないと、ケーキが乾きすぎる。

tokens.explanation: Preposition selecting accusative; expresses absence.
Common noun; complement/object of 'ohne' (accusative).
Auxiliary/copula, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate adjective.
Definite article, masculine nominative; determiner of 'Kuchen' (subject).
Common noun; subject of 'wird'.
Degree adverb intensifying the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective; complement of the copula 'wird'.
